description: Hero section with a split-screen aesthetic. Left side features a massive, friendly H1: 'Namaste, how can I help you today?' Below it, a high-contrast search bar with a pulsating Microphone icon for voice commands. Right side features a 3D-style floating collage of seasonal crops (Wheat, Rice, Cotton). The background has a subtle topographic map pattern. Primary CTA: 'Voice Search' (Large green button).
